sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출이 28억 7,000만 달러로 전년 동기 24억 1,000만 달러 대비 19% 증가했습니다.
다빈치 수술 시스템 설치대수가 11,106대로 12%, Ion 시스템은 995대로 24% 늘었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 다빈치 시술량이 약 17%, Ion 시술량이 약 44% 증가했습니다.
4분기 비GAAP 순이익에는 주당 0.11달러의 세금 혜택이 반영됐습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 비용에는 인튜이티브 재단 기부금 7,000만 달러가 포함됐으며, 이는 전년 동기 4,500만 달러에서 늘어난 규모입니다.
설치 기반 확대와 시술량 증가가 매출 19% 성장을 뒷받침했습니다.

watchItems.text: 다빈치 5 채택 확산과 Ion 시술량 고성장(약 44%)이 이어질지가 핵심입니다.
설치 기반 확대에 따른 반복적 소모품 매출 성장 추세에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

rter of 2024. Fourth quarter 2025 non-GAAP* net income attributable to Intuitive included tax benefits of $0.11 per diluted share associated with the release of unrecognized tax benefits. • Fourth quarter 2025 expenses included a $70 million contribution to the Intuitive Foundation compared to a $45 million contribution to the Intuitive Foundation in the fourth quarter of 2024. Q4 Financial Summary Gross profit, income from operations, net income attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc., and net income per diluted share attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc. are reported on a GAAP and non-GAAP* basis. The non-GAAP* measures are described below and are reconciled to the corresponding GAAP measures at the end of this release. Fourth quarter 2025 revenue was $2.87 billion, an i  Normalized numeric aliases: $70 million = 7,000만 달러; $45 million = 4,500만 달러; $2.87 billion = 28억 7,000만 달러; $2.41 billion = 24억 1,000만 달러; $0.11 = 0.11달러; $70 = 70달러; $45 = 45달러; $2.87 = 2.87달러; $2.41 = 2.41달러.

riven by growth in procedure volume, higher da Vinci system placements, and an increase in the installed base of systems. Fourth quarter 2025 instruments and accessories revenue increased by 17% to $1.66 billion, compared with $1.41 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024. The increase in instruments and accessories revenue was primarily driven by approximately 17% growth in da Vinci procedure volume and approximately 44% growth in Ion procedure volume. Fourth quarter 2025 systems revenue was $786 million, compared with $655 million in the fourth quarter of 2024. The higher systems revenue reflected increased da Vinci system placements, a higher lease installed base, and higher da Vinci system average selling prices compared with the fourth quarter of 2024.
